/CAL: APD PROG REPORT/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:04-27-22/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:4 DAYS/ADDL CTS:4/4019HALF/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO ENTER ANDCOMPLETE 6 MONTH OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE ABUSE TREATMENT PROGRAM/PROB EXT: 03-15-23/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO APD WITHIN 72 HOURS OF RELEASE/

/CAL:APD MTR FILING/PD/WIAMTR/PROB ADM REV/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SOFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ONTHE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PROGRESS REPORT/DOP//PROG:12-17-21/

/CAL:SENTENCE MODIFICATION/X:THE SENTENCE, PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED ON 10-24-17,IS MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS:/CH1:CJ 92 D/CTS:92/COTRD:AS CONDITION OF PROBATION, DEFENDSANT SHALL  BE ON SCRAM DEVICE MONITORING FOR 6 WEEKS/X:ALL OTHERCONDITIONS, PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED ON 10-24-17, REMAIN IN EFFECT,/CTORD:IF DEFENDANT FAILS ANY CONDITION OF PROBATION, INCLUDING SCRAM, A 6 MONTH HAMMER,WITH NO CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED, WILL BE IMPOSED/CONTD:STATUS OF SCRAM & PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT & POSSIBLE RELEASE/OR/CTORD:AS CONDITIONS OF RELEASEON OWN RECOGNIZANCE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL ABSTAIN FROM USE OF ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES, SHALL NOT POSSESS ANY DRUGS WITHOUT PRESCRIPTION, AND REPORT TO THESAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM FOR SCRAM DEVICE,/CONTD:STATUS OF SCRAM DEVICE & PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH1:CJSS 1 Y:PROB  5 Y:PJ 6 M/CTS:65/X:SCRAM DEVICE FORSIX WEEKS UPON RELEASE FROM CUSTODY,/PF525 12/MOP1/LSUF:24/IID:2/LVAL/LCHEM/VF4:300/RESTV/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP//X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/4019HALF/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT & POSSIBLE RELEASE/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PEOPLE'S MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO STRIKE ROBERT YICK & SEAN PERDOMO AS NAMED VICTIMS IS GRANTED,/TEXT DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS 1/DEF ADMITS PRIORSS TO COUNT 1/X PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS TOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/FNDG/CO NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES 10-03-17/ISM3/CONTD SENTENCE/DOP/
